fields.label: Mode Otonomi
fields.description: Tingkat kebebasan agent. SEMUA perilaku otonom (scheduler, routine pagi/sore, auto-reply email customer) dikumpulkan di tab ini supaya gampang dipantau dalam satu tempat.

fields.label: Default / Fallback Account
fields.description: Used when the AI Providers table below is empty. Provider is auto-detected from the Base URL / Model (Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini).

fields.label: Agent Enabled
fields.description: Uncheck to disable the agent without removing keys.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Stored encrypted. Works for any provider — match the Base URL + Model below.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Claude: claude-opus-4-8 · ChatGPT: gpt-4o · Gemini: gemini-2.5-flash

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Anthropic: https://api.anthropic.com · OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 · Gemini: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai

fields.label: AI Providers (multi-account)
fields.description: Add multiple accounts/providers. The agent runs them in priority order and automatically switches to the next when one hits its rate limit / quota.

fields.label: Automatic Change AI (failover)
fields.description: On rate-limit / quota error, automatically retry with the next enabled account.

fields.label: Document Defaults
fields.description: Applied to drafts the agent creates when not provided.

fields.label: Autonomy
fields.description: M1 always creates drafts for human review.

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: Only PDF and images can be attached. PDFs are scanned for active/dangerous content and rejected if unsafe, then rendered to flat images for the agent to read.

fields.label: Write Activity Log to Files
fields.description: Log every interaction (user input + what the AI did) to files under the agent/logs folder.

fields.label: Agent Fleet & Scheduler
fields.description: Autonomous advancement + daily routines for the Agent Center fleet.

fields.label: Autonomous Scheduler
fields.description: Let the scheduler advance in-flight agents and run the daily routines below.

fields.label: Mode Reminder
fields.description: Biasa = notifikasi teks polos ke holder, TANPA AI — HEMAT TOKEN. Ringkasan AI = agent menyusun follow-up/laporan singkat pakai AI tiap agent — BOROS TOKEN.

fields.label: Morning Prompt
fields.default: Follow-up pagi: apa langkah berikutnya untuk job ini hari ini?

fields.label: Evening Prompt
fields.default: Laporan sore: ringkas yang sudah dikerjakan & yang pending untuk job ini.

fields.label: Auto-Reply Email Customer (otonom)
fields.description: Saat ada email MASUK dari customer yang membalas email job, agent boleh membalas OTOMATIS (24 jam) bila sesuai kriteria. Kalau ragu/di luar kriteria → di-ESCALATE ke user (tidak dibalas). Butuh Email Account outgoing+incoming aktif.

fields.label: Aktifkan Auto-Reply ke Customer
fields.description: HATI-HATI: agent akan mengirim email balasan ke customer tanpa campur tangan manusia (sesuai kriteria + batasan di bawah).

fields.label: Maks Auto-Reply / job / hari
fields.description: Pengaman anti-loop: berhenti auto-reply setelah batas ini; sisanya di-escalate ke user.

fields.label: Kriteria Auto-Reply
fields.description: Kapan boleh REPLY otomatis vs harus ESCALATE ke user. Kosong = pakai default aman (escalate untuk harga/komplain/hal sensitif).

fields.label: Alur Kerja / Fase (Flows)
fields.description: Urutan fase yang harus dilalui job. Assistant membaca ini agar tahu fase berikutnya. Baris dengan kolom Flow sama = satu alur (urut dari atas).

fields.options: Contoh: isi Flow=Penjualan untuk baris Lead, Inquiry, Quotation, … Receive Voucher; dan Flow=Lain-lain untuk APN → Payment Voucher, dst.

fields.label: Extraction Skills
fields.description: Instructions the agent uses to read input and map it to Expedition fields. Leave blank to use the built-in defaults; click 'Load Default Skills' to populate and edit here.

fields.options: These skills are injected into the agent's system prompt. The Document skill is used for PDF/scan/email; the Chat skill for chat sessions. Empty = built-in default from the app.

fields.label: Document Reading Skill
fields.description: How to read documents (B/L, Sea Waybill, Manifest, invoices) into Packing List fields.

fields.label: Chat Reading Skill
fields.description: How to read chat / WhatsApp / free text into Packing List fields.
